story.text:
# 📄 Zero Knowledge Spellbook v2.0
**document** · swordsman · knowledge

31 tales teaching privacy-preserving cryptography through narrative. Six dimensions mapped to 64-star tetrahedron lattice. v2.0 synced with PVM V5.4: each tale carries Blade ID, Moon Phase, and V(π,t) term mapping. Soulbis is the primary teacher; Mage walks alongside as learner. Persona crossovers: Cipher (5,6,8,21), Architect (19,20,22), Sentinel (18,26), Ranger (24). Tale 31 opens the Quest of the Unnamed Faces — 15 blades named, 49 frontier vertices waiting.
